# goose-mcp

MCP server wrapping the goose CLI.

## Tools

- goose_version — check goose binary version and availability
- goose_session_start — start a goose session with a text prompt
- goose_session_status — get status and output of a session by id
- goose_session_list — list recent sessions with status summary
- goose_recipe_run — run a goose YAML recipe file by path
- goose_providers_list — list configured providers from goose config
- goose_extensions_list — list active extensions from goose config
- show_sessions_card — Prefab UI card: recent sessions
- show_goose_status_card — Prefab UI card: goose status summary

## Prompts

- goose_fleet_task_template — template for delegating fleet tasks to goose

## Resources

- goose://sessions/list — JSON list of all sessions

## Webapp

Dashboard at http://localhost:10949 — Sessions, Recipes, Providers, Extensions, Tools, Chat (Ollama auto-detect), Status.

## Config

Set GOOSE_BIN env var if goose is not on PATH.
Backend: 10948 | Frontend: 10949 | MCP: http://localhost:10948/mcp
